purpose: First Phase C scan of all open B2 candidate resolutions. This is internal reviewed-work metadata and is not canonical public data.

unresolved_questions: Confirm the exact Ribbon Finance to Aevo lineage dates during record drafting.
candidates.notes: Priority research candidate. Requires entity-boundary, launch, current-status, duplicate, event, and evidence review before promotion.
candidates.review_notes: Aevo Perps is a product surface of the distinct Aevo derivatives exchange. Model the entity as Aevo, not as a separate perps-only exchange.

candidates.notes: Priority research candidate. Requires entity-boundary, launch, current-status, duplicate, event, and evidence review before promotion.
candidates.review_notes: Distinct AMM DEX identity. Use Curve Finance as the canonical entity name.

unresolved_questions: Capture a dated official shutdown announcement archive during record drafting.
candidates.notes: The extracted shorthand referred to a DX.Exchange shutdown headline. Research must use the full identity before any canonical action.
candidates.review_notes: Distinct historical centralized exchange. Launch and 2019 shutdown are independently documented.

unresolved_questions: Model V3 to V4 as platform evolution, not two public entities.
candidates.notes: Priority research candidate. Requires entity-boundary, launch, current-status, duplicate, event, and evidence review before promotion.
candidates.review_notes: The public entity is dYdX. V4 is a major chain/platform migration and event in the same entity lifecycle.

unresolved_questions: Confirm the earliest public gTrade launch date from an archived official source.
candidates.notes: Priority research candidate. Requires entity-boundary, launch, current-status, duplicate, event, and evidence review before promotion.
candidates.review_notes: Gains Network is the builder/protocol organization; gTrade is the exchange identity to publish.

unresolved_questions: Confirm the dated Trader Joe to LFJ rebrand announcement during record drafting.
candidates.notes: Priority research candidate. Requires entity-boundary, launch, current-status, duplicate, event, and evidence review before promotion.
candidates.review_notes: Distinct multichain DEX. Model Trader Joe to LFJ as a rebrand in one entity lifecycle.

unresolved_questions: Decide whether Jupiter Perpetuals is a distinct exchange entity or a product surface within the broader Jupiter trading platform.
Find a durable independent source covering launch and operating status.
candidates.notes: Priority research candidate. Requires entity-boundary, launch, current-status, duplicate, event, and evidence review before promotion.
candidates.review_notes: Official materials describe a perpetual exchange program, but entity boundaries versus the Jupiter aggregator remain unresolved.

candidates.notes: Priority research candidate. Requires entity-boundary, launch, current-status, duplicate, event, and evidence review before promotion.
candidates.review_notes: Distinct Solana spot DEX identity with official history and current operating documentation.

candidates.notes: Priority research candidate. Requires entity-boundary, launch, current-status, duplicate, event, and evidence review before promotion.
candidates.review_notes: Distinct cross-chain DEX and appchain identity. Do not split chain deployments into separate entities.

candidates.notes: Priority research candidate. Requires entity-boundary, launch, current-status, duplicate, event, and evidence review before promotion.
candidates.review_notes: Distinct DEX identity. Treat V2, V3, perps integrations, and chain deployments as products/events unless later evidence requires separation.

candidates.notes: Priority research candidate. Requires entity-boundary, launch, current-status, duplicate, event, and evidence review before promotion.
candidates.review_notes: Official documentation explicitly describes THORChain as a Layer-1 decentralized exchange. Model interfaces as supporting frontends, not separate THORChain entities.

unresolved_questions: Confirm HEI entity boundary and whether this is a distinct exchange identity.
Confirm launch or operating-era evidence.
Confirm current or terminal status evidence.
Check canonical names, aliases, domains, and product-version overlap.
candidates.notes: Reviewed active candidate retained for later research when stronger official and independent evidence is available.
